trivia_bullets.text: Released September 27, 2024 in Duskmourn: House of Horror (DSK). The set is explicitly inspired by 1970s-80s slasher cinema and this card's name and flavor directly invoke that archetype: the laughing, unstoppable killer who feeds on death.
sources: magic.wizards.com: First Look at Duskmourn: House of Horror

trivia_bullets.text: Typed Creature — Human Assassin, notably not an Enchantment Creature despite DSK's enchantment-heavy identity — one of the set's more materially present slasher villains. Art by Johann Bodin.

"Every death was funnier than the last, until his howling laughter drowned out his victims' screams." No named speaker. The third-person 'his' confirms the depicted figure is the subject, establishing an escalating body count.

3/3 deathtouch for four mana that can enter as a 4/4 in a death-matters deck. EDHREC rank 19,551 — low Commander adoption; sees play as budget slot in Wilhelt and sacrifice shells where creatures die every turn.

related_cards.name: Appendage Amalgam
related_cards.note: Same set, same black creature archetype

related_cards.name: Wilhelt, the Rotcleaver
related_cards.note: Popular Commander that triggers the died-this-turn condition every end step
